title: Telemetry, Capacity, Scheduling, Deployment, Backup, and Recovery · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A cooperative of small public-service publishers incrementally builds operable recoverable Go crawler service from original deterministic HTTP, robots, sitemap, HTML, graph, and report fixtures while retaining prior Go, web, Git, accessibility, security, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of operable recoverable Go crawler service while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.
Measure CPU, heap, allocations, goroutines, open files, sockets, queue age, bytes, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.
Use one schedule owner, overlap lock, missed-run policy, configuration and artifact identity, owner pause, signal handling, and clean shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Causal Observability
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 7154 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile telemetry, capacity, durable schedules, immutable deployment, backup, restore, and safe resume; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Causal Observability.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for correlate run, policy, url key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels. For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Causal Observability, keep Causal Observability connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Backup Restore
